full_text:
Jing Yi (Wenjian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jing Yi, styledWenjian, was born in Guanghan or Shu. Encouraged learning and good conduct, restored prosperity to Yizhou. Jing Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Jing Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
